requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Cambodia / ISC; CS/IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（柬埔寨／ISC；CS/IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（柬埔寨／ISC；CS/IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Electrical safety for household refrigerating appliances in Cambodia is based on the IEC 60335 series as adopted into Cambodia Standards (CS) by the Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC): the general standard IEC 60335-1 (safety of household and similar electrical appliances) together with the particular standard IEC 60335-2-24 (particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), which also addresses flammable-refrigerant construction. Cambodia adopts IEC and ASEAN-harmonised standards rather than maintaining a wholly independent national test methodology, so the technical safety content tracks the IEC parent closely. Conformity for regulated products is demonstrated through ISC-administered conformity/import inspection arranged by the in-country importer, rather than a CE-style manufacturer self-declaration. Exporters should confirm with ISC and the importer the applicable CS/IEC 60335 edition, which test reports/certificates are accepted (for example IECEE CB scheme reports), and whether inspection is pre-shipment or at the border.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨家用制冷器具的电气安全以经柬埔寨标准局（ISC）采纳为柬埔寨标准（CS）的IEC 60335系列为基础：通用标准IEC 60335-1（家用及类似电器安全）连同专用标准IEC 60335-2-24（制冷器具、冰淇淋器具及制冰机的特殊要求），后者亦涉及可燃制冷剂结构。柬埔寨采用IEC及东盟协调标准，而非维持完全独立的国家测试方法，故技术安全内容紧贴IEC母标准。受监管产品的合格性通过由在地进口商安排的ISC管理合格评定／进口检验证明，而非CE式制造商自我声明。出口商应向ISC及进口商确认适用的CS/IEC 60335版本、接受何种检测报告／证书（例如IECEE CB体系报告），以及检验是在装运前还是在口岸进行。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨家用製冷器具的電氣安全以經柬埔寨標準局（ISC）採納為柬埔寨標準（CS）的IEC 60335系列為基礎：通用標準IEC 60335-1（家用及類似電器安全）連同專用標準IEC 60335-2-24（製冷器具、冰淇淋器具及製冰機的特殊要求），後者亦涉及可燃製冷劑結構。柬埔寨採用IEC及東盟協調標準，而非維持完全獨立的國家測試方法，故技術安全內容緊貼IEC母標準。受監管產品的合格性通過由在地進口商安排的ISC管理合格評定／進口檢驗證明，而非CE式製造商自我聲明。出口商應向ISC及進口商確認適用的CS/IEC 60335版本、接受何種檢測報告／證書（例如IECEE CB體系報告），以及檢驗是在裝運前還是在口岸進行。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-1 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances: general requirements, as adopted into Cambodia Standards (CS) by ISC
IEC 60335-2-24 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (includes flammable-refrigerant construction), as adopted into CS by ISC
IECEE CB scheme reports — commonly accepted basis for conformity where recognised by ISC/importer
ISC conformity/import inspection — arranged by the in-country importer for regulated products

summary.en: China governs household refrigerator electrical safety through GB 4706.1 (general requirements, transposing IEC 60335-1) and GB 4706.13 (particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, transposing IEC 60335-2-24), enforced under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because both the Chinese GB 4706 series and the Cambodian CS adoption descend from the same IEC 60335 parent standards, the underlying electrical-safety test content is closely aligned. The difference is administrative: a Chinese CCC certificate and GB 4706.13 test report are not automatically recognised in Cambodia and must be accepted or re-verified through ISC-administered conformity/import inspection; an IECEE CB report underlying the Chinese certification, where available, may streamline acceptance if recognised by ISC and the importer.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 4706.1（通用要求，转化IEC 60335-1）与GB 4706.13（制冷器具特殊要求，转化IEC 60335-2-24）规范家用冰箱电气安全，并在市场监管总局／认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC制度下执行。由于中国GB 4706系列与柬埔寨CS采纳均源自相同的IEC 60335母标准，其底层电气安全测试内容高度一致。差异在于行政：中国CCC证书与GB 4706.13检测报告不被柬埔寨自动承认，须经ISC管理的合格评定／进口检验接受或重新验证；中国认证背后的IECEE CB报告（如有）若获ISC及进口商承认，可简化接受流程。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 4706.1（通用要求，轉化IEC 60335-1）與GB 4706.13（製冷器具特殊要求，轉化IEC 60335-2-24）規範家用冰箱電氣安全，並在市場監管總局／認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC制度下執行。由於中國GB 4706系列與柬埔寨CS採納均源自相同的IEC 60335母標準，其底層電氣安全測試內容高度一致。差異在於行政：中國CCC證書與GB 4706.13檢測報告不被柬埔寨自動承認，須經ISC管理的合格評定／進口檢驗接受或重新驗證；中國認證背後的IECEE CB報告（如有）若獲ISC及進口商承認，可簡化接受流程。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.1 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances: general requirements (transposing IEC 60335-1; enforced under CCC)
GB 4706.13 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances (transposing IEC 60335-2-24; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)

gap.en: Because both China (GB 4706.1 / GB 4706.13) and Cambodia (CS adoption of IEC 60335-1 / 60335-2-24) derive from the same IEC parents, the technical electrical-safety content is closely aligned and a full retest is often avoidable. The gap is administrative and documentary: (1) a Chinese CCC certificate is not automatically recognised in Cambodia — acceptance runs through ISC conformity/import inspection arranged by the in-country importer; (2) an IECEE CB scheme report underlying the Chinese certification, where available, is the most transferable evidence and may streamline acceptance if recognised by ISC; (3) the applicable CS/IEC 60335 edition, accepted certificates, and inspection point (pre-shipment vs border) must be confirmed with ISC and the importer. Exporters should leverage existing CB/IEC 60335 test data rather than assume CCC alone suffices.
gap.zh: 由于中国（GB 4706.1／GB 4706.13）与柬埔寨（采纳IEC 60335-1／60335-2-24）均源自相同的IEC母标准，技术电气安全内容高度一致，通常可避免全面重测。差距在于行政与文件：（1）中国CCC证书在柬埔寨不被自动承认——接受须经由在地进口商安排的ISC合格评定／进口检验；（2）中国认证背后的IECEE CB体系报告（如有）是最具可转移性的证据，若获ISC承认可简化接受；（3）适用的CS/IEC 60335版本、接受的证书及检验环节（装运前还是口岸）须向ISC及进口商确认。出口商应善用现有CB/IEC 60335检测数据，而非假设仅凭CCC即足够。
gap.zht: 由於中國（GB 4706.1／GB 4706.13）與柬埔寨（採納IEC 60335-1／60335-2-24）均源自相同的IEC母標準，技術電氣安全內容高度一致，通常可避免全面重測。差距在於行政與文件：（1）中國CCC證書在柬埔寨不被自動承認——接受須經由在地進口商安排的ISC合格評定／進口檢驗；（2）中國認證背後的IECEE CB體系報告（如有）是最具可轉移性的證據，若獲ISC承認可簡化接受；（3）適用的CS/IEC 60335版本、接受的證書及檢驗環節（裝運前還是口岸）須向ISC及進口商確認。出口商應善用現有CB/IEC 60335檢測數據，而非假設僅憑CCC即足夠。

mandatory_status.target: Electrical safety to CS/IEC 60335-1 and IEC 60335-2-24 (as adopted by ISC) applies for regulated products via ISC conformity/import inspection; IECEE CB reports commonly accepted where recognised. No CE-style self-declaration mark
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4706.1 and GB 4706.13 are mandatory; CCC certification is required for refrigerators sold in China (SAMR/CNCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cambodia bases refrigerator electrical safety on CS/IEC 60335-1 and IEC 60335-2-24 as adopted by ISC, the same IEC parents underlying China's GB 4706.1 / GB 4706.13, so the technical content is closely aligned and a full retest is often avoidable. The gap is administrative: a Chinese CCC certificate is not automatically recognised — acceptance runs through ISC conformity/import inspection via the in-country importer. Leverage any underlying IECEE CB report and confirm the accepted CS/IEC edition, certificates, and inspection point with ISC and the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨以ISC采纳的CS/IEC 60335-1与IEC 60335-2-24作为冰箱电气安全基础，与中国GB 4706.1／GB 4706.13同源IEC母标准，故技术内容高度一致，通常可避免全面重测。差距在于行政：中国CCC证书不被自动承认——接受须经由在地进口商的ISC合格评定／进口检验。请善用任何底层IECEE CB报告，并向ISC及进口商确认接受的CS/IEC版本、证书及检验环节。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨以ISC採納的CS/IEC 60335-1與IEC 60335-2-24作為冰箱電氣安全基礎，與中國GB 4706.1／GB 4706.13同源IEC母標準，故技術內容高度一致，通常可避免全面重測。差距在於行政：中國CCC證書不被自動承認——接受須經由在地進口商的ISC合格評定／進口檢驗。請善用任何底層IECEE CB報告，並向ISC及進口商確認接受的CS/IEC版本、證書及檢驗環節。
